title: oenothera speciosa var. berlandieri
intro: Oenothera speciosa var. berlandieri, also known as the Texas evening primrose, is a species of flowering plant in the evening primrose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to its high levels of beta-carotene and other carotenoids. The health benefits of Oenothera speciosa var. berlandieri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve skin health, and support eye health. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support overall health and well-being.
